creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Created attachment 189701
Patch to update to tor-0.3.2.9

There doesn't seem to be any patch attached to this PR, so I produced this and tested on my machine.

In addition to updating the tor version, I had to modify the orconfig.h.in patch to include <osreldate.h>, otherwise every inclusion of orconfig.h generated a compiler warning on the reference to __FreeBSD_version.
